description_long: This is a Roman-style helmet made primarily of dark metal with brass or bronze trim and fittings. The dome-shaped crown features a raised ridge and a small central knob at the top, with decorative embossed lines radiating from the front. The helmet has a wide, flared neck guard at the back and cheek guards on both sides, each attached with visible rivets and adorned with circular brass accents. The brow is reinforced with a horizontal band, and the cheek guards are articulated for protection and comfort. The overall finish is slightly matte with a subtle metallic sheen, and the helmet appears robust and historically inspired.
description: A dark metal Roman-style helmet with brass trim, cheek guards, and a flared neck guard. It features embossed lines and decorative rivets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the raised ridge, central knob, and symmetrical cheek guards with brass accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flared neck guard, cheek guard attachment, and decorative brass rivets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide, curved neck guard and the smooth, unadorned back of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cheek guard, neck guard, and decorative details.
